faqs.question: How much does a space flight cost?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing offers various pricing tiers: Suborbital flights start at $150,000 per person for our StarHopper experience. Low Earth Orbit missions range from $450,000 to $1.2 million depending on cabin class and duration. Lunar expeditions start at $5 million for our MoonGlider program. All prices include training, accommodations, and standard amenities.

faqs.question: What does the ticket price include?
faqs.answer: Your SpaceWing ticket includes: comprehensive pre-flight training (3-7 days), all meals and accommodations during training, the space flight itself, in-flight meals and beverages, space suit rental, in-flight entertainment, medical monitoring, commemorative flight package, post-flight celebration, and a lifetime membership in the SpaceWing Astronaut Society.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden fees?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing believes in transparent pricing. The ticket price covers everything mentioned above. Optional extras include: premium meal packages ($5,000), private cabin upgrades, extended stays at space stations ($50,000/night), professional photography/videography packages ($15,000), and souvenir space suits ($25,000). All optional extras are clearly presented during booking.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceCredit offers qualified applicants financing up to $500,000 with terms from 12 to 60 months. Interest rates start at 6.9% APR. We also partner with premium credit card companies for points redemption programs. Many customers use home equity lines of credit for larger missions.

faqs.question: What is the deposit requirement?
faqs.answer: A $10,000 refundable deposit is required to hold your reservation. This deposit is applied to your final payment and is fully refundable if you cancel more than 180 days before departure. Within 180 days, the cancellation policy applies (see our Cancellation FAQ).

faqs.question: When is full payment due?
faqs.answer: For suborbital and orbital flights, full payment is due 60 days before departure. For lunar expeditions and longer missions, full payment is due 120 days before departure. Payment plans are available with scheduled installments leading up to these deadlines.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund if I change my mind?
faqs.answer: Yes, refunds are available based on timing: 100% refund if cancelled more than 180 days before departure (minus $500 processing fee). 75% refund if cancelled 90-180 days before. 50% refund if cancelled 60-89 days before. No refund if cancelled within 60 days, though you may transfer your booking to another person.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for returning customers?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing Astronaut Society members receive exclusive benefits: 5% discount on all future bookings, priority access to new missions, complimentary cabin upgrades when available, and invitations to member-only events. After three missions, you qualify for our Captain's Circle with 10% lifetime discount.

faqs.question: Are there any seasonal promotions?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing runs several promotions throughout the year: New Year's Early Bird specials (January), Summer Solstice Sales, Black Friday/Cyber Monday deals, and anniversary promotions. Sign up for our newsletter or follow us on social media to stay informed about current offers.

faqs.question: Can I use frequent flyer miles or credit card points?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing has partnerships with several premium credit card programs where you can redeem points for flight credits. Currently, we accept points from American Express Membership Rewards, Chase Ultimate Rewards, and Capital One miles. 100,000 points equals approximately $1,000 in SpaceWing credit.
